Temporary verification bead for Mayor to confirm gt sling can spawn a booking polecat after socket split-brain cleanup. No code changes required.
close_reason: Temporary polecat startup verification completed; booking/obsidian spawned and was cleaned up.

title: Prepare Phase 4 service execution plan
description: Fix service-layer bead dependency gaps and persist the Phase 4 implementation wave plan so future agents can start service work without relying on chat context.
acceptance_criteria: Phase 4 bead dependencies reflect required service contracts, IMPLEMENTATION.md documents the execution waves and parallelism guidance, and the documentation change is merged through PR.
close_reason: Completed via PR #33 (74cca40), with ledger evidence finalized via PR #34 (cef0e12). Added Phase 4 execution waves and controlled parallelism guidance to IMPLEMENTATION.md, recorded delivery evidence, and updated local bead dependency metadata so bo-0wh.7 depends on bo-0wh.1. Verification: git diff --check passed.

title: Document cumulative phase completion audit rule
description: Add repository instructions requiring an agent to audit Phase 1 through the just-completed phase after each phase completion, then record the audit evidence in GitHub-readable delivery logs.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md and delivery documentation tell agents to perform and log a cumulative Phase 1..X audit after a phase completes.
close_reason: Completed via PR #32 (576a5d4). AGENTS.md and docs/delivery/README.md now require a cumulative Phase 1 through Phase X audit after each phase completes, with gaps fixed or filed and evidence recorded in QUALITY_LOG.md and IMPLEMENTATION_LEDGER.md. Verification: git diff --check passed.

title: Use constructor injection in reference counter repository
description: Phase 1 conventions require constructor injection for Spring beans. BookingReferenceCounterRepository currently injects EntityManager through a @PersistenceContext field. Replace it with constructor injection while preserving native SQL counter behavior.
acceptance_criteria: BookingReferenceCounterRepository no longer uses field injection; repository behavior remains covered by mvn test.
close_reason: Completed via PR #30 (b489335) and evidence finalized via PR #31 (9b0fcac). Phase 1-3 audit found one production injection mismatch; BookingReferenceCounterRepository now uses constructor injection. Verification on master: git diff --check and mvn test pass with 17 tests, 0 failures, 0 errors.

title: Use native embedded PostgreSQL provider for repository tests
description: Repository slice tests currently use the Zonky default embedded database provider, which resolves to Docker. WSL does not expose Docker here, so tests fail after Java/Maven are fixed. Configure tests to use the native Zonky embedded PostgreSQL provider and add the required embedded-postgres test dependency.
acceptance_criteria: mvn test can start repository slice tests without requiring a Docker socket; pom includes native embedded PostgreSQL provider dependency; tests select DatabaseProvider.ZONKY explicitly.
close_reason: Completed via PR #29 and merged to master. Installed WSL-local Java/Maven environment separately, then fixed repository tests to use the native Zonky embedded PostgreSQL provider instead of Docker by adding io.zonky.test:embedded-postgres and setting DatabaseProvider.ZONKY. Verification: git diff --check, mvn compile, and mvn test passed. Merge commit 903c393.

title: Audit and fix Phase 1-2 implementation
description: Review Phase 1 foundation and Phase 2 domain implementation against specs/001_project_setup.md and specs/002_domain_model.md, fixing any concrete mismatches found.
acceptance_criteria: Phase 1 and Phase 2 files are checked against their specs; any discovered mismatch is fixed through a PR; verification results and remaining blockers are recorded.
close_reason: Completed via PR #21 and merged to master. Audited Phase 1 and Phase 2 against specs/001_project_setup.md and specs/002_domain_model.md. Fixed the one concrete mismatch found: removed fallback test datasource URL/credentials from application-test.yml so embedded PostgreSQL bootstrap can supply the datasource as specified. Verification: manual spec audit passed after fix; git diff --check passed; portable path scan passed; mvn compile remains blocked by missing Java/JAVA_HOME. Merge commit 6a7fcd6.

title: Document implementation phase plan
description: Add a GitHub-readable implementation phase plan using plain outcomes instead of local bead IDs.
acceptance_criteria: IMPLEMENTATION.md contains phase guidance that another user can understand from GitHub without knowing local bead IDs; the plan explains phase goals, deliverables, sequencing, and parallelism at a high level.
notes: Added GitHub-readable Phase Plan to IMPLEMENTATION.md without local bead IDs. Added quality log rows for git diff --check and portable-path scan. Verification passed before commit.
close_reason: Completed via PR #10 and merged to master. IMPLEMENTATION.md now contains a GitHub-readable Phase Plan with phase goals, deliverables, completion signals, and parallelism guidance without local bead IDs. QUALITY_LOG.md records verification. Merge commit f14a582.

title: Make delivery evidence instructions discoverable
description: Update repo startup instructions so new agents on their own machines can find and update delivery evidence files without relying on local context.
acceptance_criteria: AGENTS.md points agents to delivery evidence files; IMPLEMENTATION.md startup and finish steps mention the evidence files explicitly; docs/delivery/README.md describes the evidence files as portable GitHub-readable outputs for independent users.
notes: Delivery instruction files updated to make evidence requirements discoverable from GitHub. Verification: git diff --check passed; portable absolute-path scan found no matches after avoiding literal machine-specific path examples in the quality log.
close_reason: Completed via PR #9 and merged to master. AGENTS.md now points new agents to delivery evidence files; IMPLEMENTATION.md startup/finish steps mention docs/delivery files explicitly; docs/delivery/README.md explains portable GitHub-readable evidence; QUALITY_LOG.md records verification. Merge commit 4c23086.

title: Make delivery ledger timing GitHub-readable
description: Update delivery evidence docs so started/completed/elapsed timing is copied into repository files instead of requiring local Beads access.
acceptance_criteria: Implementation ledger entries include copied timing fields and timing source; implementation instructions tell agents to record timing in docs/delivery/IMPLEMENTATION_LEDGER.md; no instructions require coworkers to infer timing from local Beads.
notes: Delivery evidence docs now require GitHub-readable timing fields copied into docs/delivery/IMPLEMENTATION_LEDGER.md. Verification so far: git diff --check passed; portable absolute-path scan found no matches.
close_reason: Completed via PR #8 and merged to master. Updated IMPLEMENTATION.md, docs/delivery/README.md, and docs/delivery/IMPLEMENTATION_LEDGER.md so delivery timing is copied into GitHub-readable files. Added exact bo-u2r.1 started/completed UTC timestamps and elapsed wall time. Verification: git diff --check passed; portable absolute-path scan found no matches. Merge commit 0860bbf.

title: Generate final delivery report
description: Compile final project evidence into a coworker-facing delivery report once implementation and quality gates are complete.
acceptance_criteria: Final delivery report summarizes completed specs, beads, PRs, commits, tests, quality gates, demo instructions, known limitations, and follow-up beads.

title: Add demo and API runbook
description: Create a coworker-facing demo runbook with local startup, Swagger URL, sample curl commands, and expected lifecycle behavior.
acceptance_criteria: A demo runbook explains how to run locally, where to open Swagger, and sample create/list/confirm/start/complete/cancel API flows with expected outcomes.

title: Add spec coverage matrix
description: Create a matrix mapping each spec file to beads, implementation status, tests, and PRs.
acceptance_criteria: A spec coverage matrix lists specs/001 through specs/010 with implementation beads, test evidence, PR links, status, and notes for gaps or deferred scope.

title: Add quality gate log
description: Create a quality log artifact for compile/test/package/docker/CI commands and their outcomes during implementation.
acceptance_criteria: A quality log exists with command, scope, result, date/context, and related bead/PR fields; agents know to append relevant verification results instead of leaving them only in chat.
close_reason: Added docs/delivery/QUALITY_LOG.md with command/scope/result/date/bead/PR fields, initial bo-u2r.1 verification entries, summary metrics, and reusable entry template. Linked from IMPLEMENTATION.md. PR #7, merge commit b8c78c0.

title: Add implementation ledger template
description: Create a lightweight ledger file or template that agents can update with bead ID, PR URL, merge commit, files changed, verification commands, and notes.
acceptance_criteria: A delivery evidence ledger exists with clear fields for bead ID/title, branch, PR URL, merge commit, verification, files changed, agent, and notes; IMPLEMENTATION.md points agents to update it when appropriate.
close_reason: Added docs/delivery/IMPLEMENTATION_LEDGER.md with required fields, initial bo-u2r.1 entry, summary metrics, and reusable entry template. Linked from IMPLEMENTATION.md. PR #7, merge commit b8c78c0.

title: Epic: Produce delivery evidence and demo report
description: Create and maintain evidence artifacts that summarize dark-factory implementation progress, quality gates, spec coverage, demos, and final delivery information for coworkers.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence epic is complete when implementation ledger, quality log, spec coverage matrix, final delivery report, and demo/API runbook exist and reflect the completed project.

title: Run final quality gate
description: Run formatting/checks, full test suite, package, docker build if feasible, and record any follow-up beads.
acceptance_criteria: Final gate records results for formatting/checks, full tests, package, and Docker build where feasible; any failures or skipped gates have follow-up beads.

title: Final generated README pass
description: Update README with prerequisites, quick start, local development, API docs, env vars, tests, project structure, architecture, and contributing.
acceptance_criteria: README documents prerequisites, quick start, local development, Swagger/API docs, environment variables, tests, project structure, architecture, and contributing.

title: Add Makefile developer commands
description: Add build, test, grouped test, run, docker, clean, logs, and swagger targets.
acceptance_criteria: Makefile includes build, test, grouped tests, run local, docker build/up/down/logs, clean, and swagger targets matching specs/010_deployment.md.

title: Add GitHub Actions CI workflow
description: Add CI for master/develop push and PR, Java setup, Maven cache, unit/integration/e2e groups, packaging, artifacts, and Docker build.
acceptance_criteria: GitHub Actions workflow runs on master/develop push and PR, sets up Java 21/Maven cache, runs unit/integration/e2e groups, packages artifact, and builds Docker image.

title: Add environment example
description: Create .env.example documenting DB, security, JWT, integration, CORS, and profile variables.
acceptance_criteria: .env.example documents DB, security, JWT, integration URLs/timeouts, CORS, and SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE variables with safe placeholders.

title: Add request tracing MDC support
description: Implement filters/interceptors for requestId, principal, customerId, and bookingRef MDC lifecycle.
acceptance_criteria: Request tracing support populates requestId early, principal/customerId after authentication, bookingRef when available, and clears MDC after each request.

title: Add logback-spring configuration
description: Configure console logging locally and JSON logging for dev/prod with MDC fields.
acceptance_criteria: logback-spring.xml provides readable local console logging and JSON dev/prod logging with MDC fields and appropriate root/app log levels.

title: Add profile-specific application config
description: Add application-local/dev/prod/test configs for security defaults, clients, logging, DB, and health behavior.
acceptance_criteria: application-local/dev/prod/test configs set security defaults, client/profile behavior, DB/logging/health overrides, and do not activate real clients before contracts exist.

title: Add docker-compose local stack
description: Define local PostgreSQL and booking-service with SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=local and correct ports/env.
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose defines PostgreSQL and booking-service with local profile, DB env/defaults, port 8081, dependency ordering, and no Kafka services.

title: Add Dockerfile
description: Build a container image with Maven-produced JAR and container-aware JVM settings.
acceptance_criteria: Dockerfile builds/runs the Maven-produced jar with Java 21-compatible base image, container-aware JVM settings, non-root/sensible runtime where feasible, and correct app port.

title: Add full lifecycle E2E test
description: Test create, confirm, start, complete, and list using local stubs and embedded PostgreSQL.
acceptance_criteria: Full lifecycle E2E test creates a booking, confirms, starts, completes, lists/verifies it, and runs with local stubs plus embedded PostgreSQL.

title: Add security integration tests
description: Run secured endpoint flows with real JWTs for roles, ownership, and disabled-security behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Security integration tests exercise real filter/config behavior for JWT roles, ownership, disabled security, public endpoints, protected metrics, and error status precedence.

title: Add controller integration tests
description: Expand MockMvc coverage for validation, serialization, pagination, and status codes.
acceptance_criteria: Controller integration tests cover validation errors, serialization shape, pagination/filter parameters, status codes, and representative endpoint flows.

title: Add service behavior tests
description: Expand service unit tests using test builders and client mocks for business edge cases.
acceptance_criteria: Service behavior tests cover business edge cases beyond initial unit tests, including external client failures, invalid transitions, validation failures, and transactional no-change expectations.

title: Add repository integration tests
description: Expand embedded PostgreSQL tests for repositories, migrations, counters, and specifications.
acceptance_criteria: Repository integration tests run against embedded PostgreSQL and cover migrations, repositories, eager fetches, specifications, and reference counter behavior.

title: Add domain model tests
description: Test EquipmentType parsing, BookingStatus transitions, validation constraints, and entity relationship behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Domain tests cover EquipmentType fromCode/@JsonValue, BookingStatus transition expectations, validation constraints, entity relationship setup, and equality safeguards.

title: Add JWT test helper utilities
description: Create helpers to generate customer, service, operator, and admin test JWTs with valid/invalid claims.
acceptance_criteria: JWT test helpers generate customer/service/operator/admin tokens plus invalid/expired/missing-claim variants compatible with JwtTokenProvider tests.

title: Add test data builder utilities
description: Create builders/factories for valid booking requests, entities, equipment lines, and lifecycle states.
acceptance_criteria: Test data builders/factories produce valid booking requests, entities, equipment lines, lifecycle states, and reusable defaults without hiding important test differences.

title: Add integration infrastructure tests
description: Test property binding, RestClient bean creation, logging redaction, and health exposure assumptions.
acceptance_criteria: Integration infrastructure tests cover property binding, RestClient bean creation, timeout/logging interceptor wiring, redaction behavior, and health exposure assumptions where feasible.

title: Add health endpoint configuration
description: Configure actuator health/info/metrics exposure and health detail behavior by profile.
acceptance_criteria: Actuator health/info/metrics exposure and health detail behavior match local/dev/prod expectations without assuming external services expose actuator endpoints.

title: Add Resilience4j defaults
description: Add dependencies/config for circuit breaker and retry defaults plus comments for future per-client overrides.
acceptance_criteria: Resilience4j dependencies and default circuit breaker/retry config are present using Spring Boot 3-compatible artifacts, with comments for future per-client overrides.

title: Add RestClient logging interceptor
description: Log outbound method/URL, redacted headers, and response status/timing without bodies at DEBUG.
acceptance_criteria: RestClientLoggingInterceptor logs outbound method/URL, redacted headers, response status, and elapsed time; it does not log Authorization values or bodies at DEBUG.

title: Add RestClientConfig
description: Create qualified RestClient beans with base URLs, headers, timeouts, and request factory configuration.
acceptance_criteria: RestClientConfig provides qualified schedule/equipment/quote RestClient beans with base URLs, JSON headers, timeout-capable request factory, and logging interceptor registration.

title: Add IntegrationProperties
description: Define app.integration properties for schedule, equipment, and quote APIs with base URLs and timeouts.
acceptance_criteria: IntegrationProperties binds app.integration schedule/equipment/quote base URLs and timeouts with nested configuration and is enabled for injection.

title: Add error handling tests
description: Verify structured error bodies, status codes, validation violations, and requestId behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Error handling tests verify status codes, JSON shape, validation violations, requestId behavior, safe messages, and representative business/framework exception mappings.

title: Map framework validation and HTTP exceptions
description: Map MethodArgumentNotValidException, constraint violations, unreadable JSON, type mismatches, unsupported methods, and no handler cases.
acceptance_criteria: Framework exceptions for validation, constraints, unreadable JSON, type mismatch, unsupported method/media, missing handlers, and fallback access denied are mapped consistently.

title: Map business exceptions
description: Map not found, validation, state transition, schedule/quote/equipment failures to the specified status codes.
acceptance_criteria: Business exceptions map to specified status codes: not found 404, validation 400, invalid state 409, schedule/quote 422, equipment unavailable 503, with meaningful safe messages.

title: Implement GlobalExceptionHandler skeleton
description: Add @RestControllerAdvice with consistent response construction and request path/requestId handling.
acceptance_criteria: GlobalExceptionHandler is a @RestControllerAdvice that builds consistent error responses, obtains request path/requestId, and avoids leaking stack traces or sensitive data.

title: Add error response DTOs
description: Implement ErrorResponse and validation violation DTOs with optional requestId support.
acceptance_criteria: ErrorResponse and validation violation DTOs model timestamp/status/error/message/path/requestId and field-level validation details with optional requestId omission.

title: Add security and ownership tests
description: Cover role access, disabled security mode, missing customer claims, ownership mismatch, and privileged/service behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Security tests cover disabled security, missing/invalid tokens, role allow/deny rules, customer ownership match/mismatch, missing customer claim, and service/admin/operator behavior.

title: Wire ownership checks into controllers
description: Call BookingAccessAuthorizer from create, list, get, and cancel endpoints before service methods.
acceptance_criteria: Controllers call BookingAccessAuthorizer before create/list/get/cancel service methods; no broad @PreAuthorize replacement is introduced unless specs change consistently.

title: Add BookingAccessAuthorizer
description: Implement create/list/existing-booking ownership checks using BookingRepository and SecurityContextHelper.
acceptance_criteria: BookingAccessAuthorizer implements create/list/booking ownership checks, allows SERVICE/OPERATOR/ADMIN as specified, returns 404 ownership deferral for missing records, and rejects missing customer claims with 403.

title: Add SecurityContextHelper
description: Expose current subject, customerId, username, roles, role checks, and privileged ownership helpers.
acceptance_criteria: SecurityContextHelper exposes current subject, optional customerId, username, roles, hasRole, and isOwnerOrPrivileged semantics matching specs/006_security.md.

title: Implement SecurityConfig
description: Configure stateless security, optional permit-all mode, public docs/health endpoints, protected metrics, and role rules.
acceptance_criteria: SecurityConfig is stateless, disables CSRF, supports securityProperties.enabled=false permit-all mode, allows docs/health/info, protects metrics as ADMIN, and enforces endpoint role rules.

title: Implement security error handlers
description: Add AuthenticationEntryPoint and AccessDeniedHandler with structured JSON responses.
acceptance_criteria: AuthenticationEntryPoint and AccessDeniedHandler return structured JSON error bodies with 401/403 status, content type application/json, path, and safe messages.

title: Implement JWT authentication filter
description: Add OncePerRequestFilter that parses Bearer tokens, validates them, and populates SecurityContext without throwing for invalid tokens.
acceptance_criteria: JWT filter parses Bearer tokens, validates them, populates SecurityContext for valid tokens, continues unauthenticated for missing/invalid tokens, and never throws raw JWT parsing errors.

title: Implement JwtTokenProvider
description: Validate JWTs, extract subject, username/name, roles, and optional customerId/customer_id claims.
acceptance_criteria: JwtTokenProvider validates signature/expiration/issuer, extracts subject, username/name, normalized ROLE_* roles, and optional customerId/customer_id without logging token contents.

title: Add security and JWT properties
description: Add typed configuration properties for app.security and app.jwt with validation and environment defaults.
acceptance_criteria: Typed app.security and app.jwt configuration properties exist with validation/defaults; security can be disabled for local/unsecured mode; values are externalized through application config/env variables.

title: Add controller tests for happy paths
description: Test successful create, get, list, cancel, confirm, start, and complete endpoint behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Controller tests cover successful create/get/list/cancel/confirm/start/complete behavior, JSON shape, and basic status codes.

title: Implement lifecycle endpoints
description: Add confirm, start, and complete PATCH endpoints with OpenAPI metadata and response mapping.
acceptance_criteria: Confirm/start/complete PATCH endpoints exist, use the specified paths, call the service methods, map responses, and include OpenAPI metadata.

title: Implement cancel booking endpoint
description: Add PATCH /api/v1/bookings/{id}/cancel with service call and response mapping.
acceptance_criteria: PATCH /api/v1/bookings/{id}/cancel authorizes access, calls cancelBooking, maps BookingResponse, and returns HTTP 200.

title: Implement list bookings endpoint
description: Add GET /api/v1/bookings with optional customerId/status filters, Pageable defaults, and PagedResponse mapping.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/bookings supports optional customerId/status filters, pageable defaults/max size, authorization hook, PagedResponse mapping, and HTTP 200.

title: Implement get booking endpoint
description: Add GET /api/v1/bookings/{id} accepting numeric IDs and BKG references with validation and mapping.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/bookings/{id} accepts numeric IDs or BKG references, rejects invalid formats with BookingValidationException, authorizes access, and returns BookingResponse.

title: Implement create booking endpoint
description: Add POST /api/v1/bookings with validation, service call, mapper, 201 response, and OpenAPI metadata.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/bookings validates request body, calls authorization hook when present, invokes BookingService.createBooking, maps response, returns HTTP 201, and documents responses.

title: Add BookingMapper
description: Map Booking entities and equipment lines to API responses without exposing JPA entities.
acceptance_criteria: BookingMapper maps Booking and equipment lines to response DTOs, including equipment API codes and ISO-8601 timestamp-compatible fields.

title: Add response DTO records
description: Implement BookingResponse, PagedResponse, and nested response DTO records.
acceptance_criteria: Response DTO records model BookingResponse, nested response data, and PagedResponse without exposing JPA entities.

title: Add request DTO records
description: Implement create booking and supporting request DTO records with Bean Validation annotations.
acceptance_criteria: Request DTO records model create booking input with nested customer/cargo/equipment data and Bean Validation annotations from the API spec.

title: Add service unit tests
description: Cover create, read, list, reference generation, state machine, and lifecycle behavior with focused unit tests.
acceptance_criteria: Focused service tests cover create/read/list/reference generation/state transitions/lifecycle failures with mocks or lightweight fixtures as appropriate.

title: Implement cancel booking flow
description: Implement cancelBooking with ownership-ready access pattern, state validation, release warning behavior, and persistence.
acceptance_criteria: cancelBooking validates cancellable states, releases equipment for CONFIRMED bookings with warning-only failure handling, saves CANCELLED, and returns the saved booking.

title: Implement start and complete booking flows
description: Implement startBooking and completeBooking with state machine validation and persistence.
acceptance_criteria: startBooking and completeBooking validate allowed transitions with BookingStateMachine, persist status changes transactionally, and reject invalid states.

title: Implement confirm booking flow
description: Implement confirmBooking with state validation, equipment reservation, persistence, and rollback behavior.
acceptance_criteria: confirmBooking loads booking/equipment, validates PENDING to CONFIRMED, reserves equipment, saves status, returns saved booking, and does not change status on reservation failure.

title: Implement booking read service flows
description: Implement getBookingById, getBookingByReference, and getBookings with pagination and filters.
acceptance_criteria: Read/list service methods load equipment where required, throw BookingNotFoundException for missing records, support optional filters/pageable, and are read-only transactional.

title: Implement create booking service flow
description: Implement BookingService.createBooking with request validation, external checks, reference generation, entity assembly, and transaction boundary.
acceptance_criteria: createBooking validates equipment/customer/type data, checks schedule and quote clients, generates reference, persists booking/equipment in one transaction, and leaves auth to API/security layer.

title: Add BookingReferenceGenerator
description: Generate BKG-{YEAR}-{SEQ} references using the yearly counter repository and UTC year.
acceptance_criteria: BookingReferenceGenerator formats BKG-{YEAR}-{SEQ} using UTC year and BookingReferenceCounterRepository, with zero-padded five-digit sequence values.
close_reason: Completed via PR #36 (b946bb0). Added BookingReferenceGenerator using UTC year and BookingReferenceCounterRepository, plus focused unit test. Verification: git diff --check, mvn compile, and mvn test -Dtest=BookingReferenceGeneratorTest passed.

title: Add BookingStateMachine
description: Implement a dedicated component that validates every allowed and rejected lifecycle transition.
acceptance_criteria: BookingStateMachine is a component with validateTransition and rejects every invalid lifecycle transition before state mutation.
close_reason: Completed via PR #38. Added BookingStateMachine component and focused tests for allowed, rejected, and null transitions. Verification: git diff --check, mvn compile, and mvn test -Dtest=BookingStateMachineTest passed.

title: Add local stub client implementations
description:
attached_molecule: bo-wisp-yph6
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-05-18T14:47:59Z
attached_args: Phase 4 parallel work. Implement only local-profile stub clients for ScheduleClient, EquipmentClient, and QuoteClient. Avoid BookingService and other service-flow files; another agent is working bo-0wh.7 in parallel.

base_branch=master

Implement local-profile stubs for schedule, equipment, and quote clients.
acceptance_criteria: Local-profile stub clients are @Service beans under @Profile("local") and return deterministic dummy success data suitable for local/E2E flows.

title: Add external client interfaces and DTOs
description: Define ScheduleClient, EquipmentClient, QuoteClient, and minimal interface DTOs used by BookingService.
acceptance_criteria: ScheduleClient, EquipmentClient, QuoteClient, and required client DTOs/interfaces support the service contract without assuming real external API paths.
close_reason: Completed via PR #37. Added ScheduleClient, EquipmentClient, QuoteClient, ScheduleDTO, and EquipmentLineDTO from specs/004_business_rules.md. Verification: git diff --check and mvn compile passed.

title: Add service exception classes
description:
base_branch=master

base_branch=master

Create BookingValidationException, BookingNotFoundException, ScheduleNotAvailableException, QuoteNotValidException, EquipmentReservationException, and IllegalStateTransitionException.
acceptance_criteria: All custom service/business exceptions named in specs/004_business_rules.md exist with useful constructors/messages and no broad catch-all behavior.
close_reason: Completed via PR #35 (c9639b2). Added all service/business exception classes required by specs/004_business_rules.md with message and message-plus-cause constructors. Verification: git diff --check and mvn compile passed.

title: Add data access slice tests
description: Test repositories, fetch queries, specifications, and reference counter behavior with embedded PostgreSQL.
acceptance_criteria: Embedded PostgreSQL tests cover repository queries, eager fetches, specifications, migration shape, and yearly counter concurrency/basic behavior.
close_reason: Completed via PR #27 and merged to master. Added embedded PostgreSQL data access slice tests covering BookingRepository derived queries, eager fetches, specifications, cascade behavior, reference counter migration shape, yearly sequence behavior, and concurrent allocation. Verification: git diff --check passed; mvn test remains blocked by missing Java/JAVA_HOME. Merge commit 8299fd0.

title: Add BookingReferenceCounterRepository
description: Implement concurrency-safe yearly counter increments using PostgreSQL INSERT ON CONFLICT semantics.
acceptance_criteria: BookingReferenceCounterRepository atomically returns yearly sequence values with PostgreSQL INSERT ON CONFLICT semantics and transactional execution.
close_reason: Completed via PR #24 and merged to master. Added BookingReferenceCounterRepository using transactional PostgreSQL INSERT ON CONFLICT ... DO UPDATE ... RETURNING semantics to return 1 for new years and previous next_value for existing years. Verification: git diff --check passed; mvn compile remains blocked by missing Java/JAVA_HOME. Merge commit 9a666ae.

title: Add BookingSpecification
description: Implement composable Specification helpers using entity field names and null-safe optional filters.
acceptance_criteria: BookingSpecification provides null-safe hasCustomerId, hasStatus, hasScheduleId, createdAfter, and createdBefore helpers using entity field names.
close_reason: Completed via PR #26 and merged to master. Added BookingSpecification with null-safe hasCustomerId, hasStatus, hasScheduleId, createdAfter, and createdBefore helpers using entity field names. Verification: git diff --check passed; mvn compile remains blocked by missing Java/JAVA_HOME. Merge commit 7335b8d.

title: Add eager booking fetch queries
description: Add repository queries to load bookings with equipment lines by Long ID and booking reference.
acceptance_criteria: Repository methods eagerly fetch booking equipment lines by Long ID and booking reference using JPQL and return Optional<Booking>.
close_reason: Completed via PR #25 and merged to master. Added JPQL LEFT JOIN FETCH methods on BookingRepository for eager equipment line loading by booking ID and booking reference. Verification: git diff --check passed; mvn compile remains blocked by missing Java/JAVA_HOME. Merge commit e17de8d.

title: Add BookingEquipmentLineRepository
description: Implement equipment line repository with find/delete by booking ID and required modifying transaction behavior.
acceptance_criteria: BookingEquipmentLineRepository extends JpaRepository<BookingEquipmentLine, Long> and supports find/delete by booking ID with correct modifying transaction behavior.
close_reason: Completed via PR #23 and merged to master. Added BookingEquipmentLineRepository extending JpaRepository with findByBookingId and @Modifying @Transactional deleteByBookingId per specs/003_data_access.md. Verification: git diff --check passed; mvn compile remains blocked by missing Java/JAVA_HOME. Merge commit c94a53e.

title: Add BookingRepository
description: Implement BookingRepository extending JpaRepository<Booking, Long> and JpaSpecificationExecutor with reference/customer/status/schedule queries.
acceptance_criteria: BookingRepository extends JpaRepository<Booking, Long> and JpaSpecificationExecutor; required reference/customer/status/schedule/count query methods are present.
close_reason: Completed via PR #22 and merged to master. Added BookingRepository extending JpaRepository and JpaSpecificationExecutor with reference, customer, status, schedule, existence, and count query methods from specs/003_data_access.md. Verification: git diff --check passed; mvn compile remains blocked by missing Java/JAVA_HOME. Merge commit 9983dc8.

title: Add entity equality and serialization safeguards
description: Apply equals/hashCode/toString exclusions and JSON annotations to avoid recursive serialization and unstable identity behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Entity equals/hashCode use id only; toString/JSON annotations prevent circular serialization; generated Lombok annotations do not include recursive relationships unsafely.
close_reason: Completed by PR #18 / merge commit 94fefad. Booking and BookingEquipmentLine now use @EqualsAndHashCode(onlyExplicitlyIncluded = true) with id included; relationship fields avoid recursive behavior with @ToString.Exclude, and BookingEquipmentLine.booking uses @JsonIgnore. No additional repo change was needed for this verification bead.

title: Add booking reference counter migration
description: Create Flyway migration for bookings, booking_equipment_lines, indexes, and booking_reference_counters.
acceptance_criteria: Flyway migration creates bookings, booking_equipment_lines, booking_reference_counters, indexes, constraints, and PostgreSQL column types matching the entity model.
close_reason: Completed via PR #19 and merged to master. Added V1__create_booking_tables.sql creating bookings, booking_equipment_lines, and booking_reference_counters with PostgreSQL types, constraints, indexes, and FK behavior matching the entity model. Verification: git diff --check passed; portable path scan passed; mvn compile blocked by missing Java/JAVA_HOME and recorded in delivery evidence. Merge commit 7ed0265.

close_reason: Completed via PR #18 and merged to master.
